__fixture__.name: review_pack_captured_scope_vs_live
__fixture__.scenario: A review pack was captured from provider state before the current branch advanced. The reviewer compares the captured provider basis with current live provider scope, so the record keeps both refs and exports mixed captured/live metadata instead of flattening the pack to current.

badge.accessible_name: Snapshot captured at 2026-04-26T12:30:00Z; current provider scope differs.
badge.summary_label: Review pack is exact for the captured provider basis and compared against current provider scope separately.

freshness_floor.label: Current provider truth requires explicit provider recheck.

basis.basis_label: Provider review pack captured before the branch advanced.

completeness.covered_scope_label: All provider review rows included in the capture.

invalidation.label: Current provider branch advanced after the review pack was captured.

scope_truth.comparison_label: Current provider scope is branch-current; captured pack scope is the provider state from 2026-04-26T12:30:00Z.
